tasks.label: build: core
tasks.detail: Build @workerking/core and its deps (shared) — needed before running/debugging the daemon or the app (which spawns the built daemon).

tasks.label: Run Daemon (Claude Logs)
tasks.detail: Build + launch the core daemon backgrounded, console captured to tail-logs/daemon.log.

tasks.label: Run App (Claude Logs)
tasks.detail: Build core + launch the Electron app backgrounded, console captured to tail-logs/app.log.

tasks.label: Tail Logs
tasks.detail: Snapshot the last 100 lines of every captured source.

tasks.label: Tail Logs (errors)
tasks.detail: Snapshot only error/warn lines across every captured source.

tasks.label: Stop Log Runners
tasks.detail: Tree-kill every process started by run-with-logs.ps1 and clean up PID files.
